name: escc
description: EverythingSales Claude Code (ESCC) - a Claude Code sales harness for SDRs, AEs, Sales Managers, and RevOps. Adapted from Everything Claude Code (MIT).

scripts.test: node scripts/ci/check-unicode-safety.js && node scripts/ci/validate-agents.js && node scripts/ci/validate-commands.js && node scripts/ci/validate-rules.js && node scripts/ci/validate-skills.js && node scripts/ci/validate-hooks.js && node scripts/ci/validate-manifests.js && node scripts/ci/validate-no-personal-paths.js && node scripts/ci/validate-no-secrets.js && node scripts/ci/validate-no-company-tokens.js && npm run catalog:check && npm run registry:check && node tests/run-all.js
